incidents.attacker: Iran — military (kinetic strike on cloud infrastructure)
incidents.vector: Military drone strike near/on AWS data center facilities in Bahrain amid the US-Iran conflict.
incidents.impact: Second disruption in a month to AWS Middle East regions; customers forced to migrate workloads to alternate regions; structural damage and power loss at facilities.

incidents.victim: Signal users — US government officials, military, journalists
incidents.vector: Phishing messages mimicking automated support notices to trick victims into linking attacker devices or surrendering account access.
incidents.impact: Thousands of Signal accounts compromised globally; unauthorized access to messages and contact lists of current and former US government officials, military personnel, and journalists.

incidents.vector: Self-propagating worm targeting exposed Docker APIs, Kubernetes clusters, and Redis servers; wiper component triggered by Iran timezone or Farsi locale.
incidents.impact: Data destruction on systems matching Iran's timezone or Farsi settings; wipes entire Kubernetes clusters when detected; part of broader cloud exploitation campaign.

incidents.victim: IoT device owners and DDoS targets including US Department of Defense
incidents.vector: Compromised 3 million+ IoT devices (routers, cameras) via known vulnerabilities to form four botnets (Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, Mossad).
incidents.impact: Hundreds of thousands of DDoS attacks launched; extortion payments demanded from victims; infrastructure seized by DOJ with international partners.

incidents.vector: Exploited zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-20131) in Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center software, with access weeks before public disclosure.
incidents.impact: Double-extortion ransomware targeting healthcare, education, manufacturing, and government; custom RATs, webshells, and post-compromise reconnaissance deployed.

incidents.victim: Tycoon2FA phishing platform users and victims globally
incidents.vector: Adversary-in-the-middle phishing platform that steals session cookies to bypass MFA; resumed operations after Europol takedown of 330 domains on March 4.
incidents.impact: Platform previously responsible for 62% of phishing blocked by Microsoft; 30M+ malicious emails per month at peak; campaign volume has returned to pre-takedown levels.

incidents.victim: Aqua Security Trivy users / CI/CD pipelines
incidents.vector: Supply chain attack injecting credential-stealing malware into official Trivy vulnerability scanner GitHub Actions releases.
incidents.impact: SSH keys, cloud credentials, Kubernetes tokens, and cryptocurrency wallets stolen from CI/CD pipelines; malicious versions published before discovery and removal.

incidents.victim: Targeted individuals globally (via commercial spyware and state actors)
incidents.attacker: Multiple — commercial spyware vendors and state-sponsored actors
incidents.vector: Full-chain iOS exploit (DarkSword) leveraging multiple zero-day vulnerabilities to fully compromise iPhones.
incidents.impact: Complete device compromise; exploit chain adopted by multiple commercial surveillance vendors and suspected state-sponsored actors since November 2025.

incidents.vector: Long-term persistent access maintained for years within military networks in Southeast Asia.
incidents.impact: Multi-year espionage campaign inside military organizations; full scope of data exfiltration unknown.

incidents.attacker: Iran — Ministry of Intelligence (MOIS) hacktivist proxies
incidents.vector: Compromised Microsoft endpoint management (Intune) environment to execute mass device wipe across the organization.
incidents.impact: 200,000+ systems, servers, and mobile devices wiped; 5,000+ employees sent home in Ireland; offices in 79 countries disrupted; CISA issued advisory on endpoint management hardening.

incidents.vector: Exploited overly permissive guest user configurations in Salesforce Experience Cloud sites using modified open-source scanning tools.
incidents.impact: Third widespread attack spree on Salesforce customers in six months; approximately 100 companies compromised; data stolen from CRM objects without authentication.

incidents.victim: Hundreds of organizations across multiple sectors
incidents.vector: AI-generated phishing emails exploiting Microsoft device authentication flow (OAuth) to steal valid tokens; Railway PaaS used for credential harvesting infrastructure.
incidents.impact: 344+ confirmed compromises; valid OAuth tokens stolen granting 90-day access without passwords or MFA; affecting healthcare, government, finance, manufacturing, and law firms.

incidents.vector: Compromised administrative account days before deploying Pay2Key ransomware; cleared event logs after encryption.
incidents.impact: Healthcare environment encrypted; attack coincided with US-Iran military conflict; group has collected $8M in ransoms from 170 victims since summer 2025.

incidents.vector: Zero-day vulnerabilities in Cisco SD-WAN exploited for at least three years before discovery; five of nine disclosed vulnerabilities actively exploited.
incidents.impact: Management-plane and control-plane compromise of network edge devices; persistent access to enterprise network infrastructure; CISA emergency directive issued.

incidents.victim: Iranian dissidents, journalists, and civil society
incidents.vector: Malware disguised as legitimate programs (Pictory, KeePass, Telegram) deployed via social engineering; Telegram bots used as command-and-control infrastructure.
incidents.impact: Screen and audio recordings, file exfiltration, and persistent surveillance of targeted individuals; FBI issued flash alert tying activity to MOIS.

incidents.vector: Conspiracy to secretly divert billions of dollars worth of high-performance AI computing servers assembled in the US to China.
incidents.impact: Three individuals indicted; cutting-edge AI server technology allegedly diverted to China circumventing export controls.

incidents.vector: Ransomware deployment targeting healthcare sector in the Oceania region.
incidents.impact: Healthcare services disrupted; patient care operations held hostage by ransomware demands.

incidents.vector: Resurfaced with a sophisticated new toolkit for cyber espionage operations.
incidents.impact: Established Russian military intelligence cyber unit has deployed new capabilities, signaling renewed operational tempo.
